# KaTeX

This directory vendors KaTeX 0.17.0 for offline formula rendering in the extension workstation.

- Project: https://katex.org/
- Source: https://github.com/KaTeX/KaTeX
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE` in this directory.

Included browser assets are `katex.min.js`, `katex.min.css`, required fonts, and the auto-render, mhchem, and copy-tex extensions.
